end end f=#p return r(J)end,function(i,t)local r=s(t)local S=function(S,h,p,e)return f(i,{S,h;p;e},t,r)end return S end return(X(3741117-(-837280),{}))(r(J))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[t(934422+-932405)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
